---
title: "Cox"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

df <- read_tsv("final_dataset_selected.tsv")

# 1. enumerate survival outcome
df2 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    event = case_when(
      vital_status %in% c("Dead", "dead", "DEAD") ~ 1,
      vital_status %in% c("Alive", "alive", "ALIVE") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    time = case_when(
      event == 1 ~ as.numeric(days_to_death),
      event == 0 ~ as.numeric(days_to_last_follow_up),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# 2. clean stage
df2 <- df2 %>%
  mutate(
    stage_simple = case_when(
      str_detect(stage, regex("^stage i(?!v)", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Stage I",
      str_detect(stage, regex("^stage ii(?!i?i?v)", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Stage II",
      str_detect(stage, regex("^stage iii", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Stage III",
      str_detect(stage, regex("^stage iv", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Stage IV",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    stage_simple = factor(stage_simple, levels = c("Stage I", "Stage II", "Stage III", "Stage IV")),
    BRCA_Subtype_PAM50 = factor(BRCA_Subtype_PAM50)
  )

# 3. keep useful rows
df2 <- df2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(time), !is.na(event), time > 0,
         !is.na(age_at_diagnosis),
         !is.na(stage_simple),
         !is.na(BRCA_Subtype_PAM50))
```
```{r}
hypoxia_genes <- c(
  "VEGFA", "ANGPTL4", "CA9", "EGLN3", "LDHA",
  "SLC2A1", "ENO1", "PGK1", "HK2", "TPI1",
  "ALDOA", "GPI", "P4HA1"
)

```

```{r}
#baseline Cox

library(survival)

cox_basic <- coxph(
  Surv(time, event) ~ age_at_diagnosis + stage_simple + BRCA_Subtype_PAM50  + race + ajcc_pathologic_t+ajcc_pathologic_n+ajcc_pathologic_m+FLVCR2 + FABP5+SPINT1+ 
  VEGFA +ANGPTL4+CA9+EGLN3+LDHA+SLC2A1+ENO1+PGK1+HK2+TPI1+ALDOA+GPI+P4HA1,
  data = df2
)

summary(cox_basic)
```
```{r}
#panelized Cox
library(glmnet)
library(survival)

model_df <- df2 %>%
  select(time, event, age_at_diagnosis, stage_simple, BRCA_Subtype_PAM50, race,ajcc_pathologic_t,ajcc_pathologic_n,ajcc_pathologic_m,FLVCR2, FABP5, SPINT1,VEGFA ,ANGPTL4,CA9,EGLN3,LDHA,SLC2A1,ENO1,PGK1,HK2,TPI1,ALDOA,GPI,P4HA1) %>%
  na.omit()

x <- model.matrix(
  ~ age_at_diagnosis + stage_simple + BRCA_Subtype_PAM50 + race + ajcc_pathologic_t+ajcc_pathologic_n+ajcc_pathologic_m + FLVCR2 + FABP5+SPINT1+VEGFA +ANGPTL4+CA9+EGLN3+LDHA+SLC2A1+ENO1+PGK1+HK2+TPI1+ALDOA+GPI+P4HA1,
  data = model_df
)[, -1]

y <- Surv(model_df$time, model_df$event)

set.seed(123)
cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x,
  y = y,
  family = "cox",
  alpha = 0.5,      # elastic net; 0=ridge, 1=lasso
  nfolds = 10
)

plot(cvfit)

best_lambda <- cvfit$lambda.min
best_lambda_1se <- cvfit$lambda.1se

fit <- glmnet(
  x = x,
  y = y,
  family = "cox",
  alpha = 0.5,
  lambda = best_lambda
)

coef(fit)
```
```{r}
model_df$risk_score <- as.numeric(
  predict(cvfit, newx = x, s = "lambda.min", type = "link")
)
```

```{r}
library(survminer)

model_df$risk_group <- ifelse(
  model_df$risk_score >= median(model_df$risk_score, na.rm = TRUE),
  "High risk", "Low risk"
)

fit_km <- survfit(Surv(time, event) ~ risk_group, data = model_df)

ggsurvplot(
  fit_km,
  data = model_df,
  pval = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
# How each factor contribute to the final risk score
coef_vec <- as.numeric(coef(cvfit, s = "lambda.min"))

contribution_matrix <- sweep(x, 2, coef_vec, "*")
contribution_matrix
```

```{r}
# 1. 重新运行交叉验证，指定衡量指标为 C-index
set.seed(123)
cvfit_c <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x,
  y = y,
  family = "cox",
  alpha = 0.5,
  nfolds = 10,
  type.measure = "C"  # 关键：强制要求计算 C-index
)

# 2. 提取最棒的 C-index 值
# cvfit_c$cvm 存储了每个 lambda 对应的 C-index 平均值
best_c_index <- max(cvfit_c$cvm) 

print(paste("Cross-validated C-index:", round(best_c_index, 4)))

# 3. 画出 C-index 随 lambda 变化的图
plot(cvfit_c)

```
```{r}
dim(model_df)
dim(df2)
```

```{r}
# 提取 model_df 中的风险信息（保留一个唯一标识符，如果没有 ID，我们直接根据行名或列合并）
# 假设你的 df2 有唯一标识符列（比如 'sample_id'），请替换下面的 'sample_id'
# 如果没有 ID 列，可以使用原始行号

# 创建一个临时表存储结果
risk_results <- model_df %>%
  select(time, event, age_at_diagnosis, risk_score, risk_group)

# 如果你的原始数据 df2 和 model_df 的行序完全一致（且没有在 filter 之后打乱）
# 推荐使用 left_join，这样最安全
# 这里假设我们通过 time 和 event 等关键信息进行匹配（如果有 ID 更好）
df2_final <- df2 %>%
  left_join(risk_results) 

# 检查一下是否合并成功
head(df2_final %>% select(time, event, risk_score, risk_group))

```

```{r}
# 1. 将 contribution_matrix 转为数据框以便处理
contrib_df <- as.data.frame(contribution_matrix)

# 2. 定义一个函数，提取每行绝对值最大的前3个列名
get_top_3_contributors <- function(row) {
  # 取绝对值排序
  sorted_indices <- order(abs(row), decreasing = TRUE)
  # 提取前三个列名
  top_names <- names(row)[sorted_indices[1:3]]
  return(top_names)
}

# 3. 应用函数并生成 3 个新列
top_contributors <- t(apply(contrib_df, 1, get_top_3_contributors))
colnames(top_contributors) <- c("Top1_Contributor", "Top2_Contributor", "Top3_Contributor")

# 4. 将这三列合并回 model_df
model_df <- cbind(model_df, top_contributors)

# 5. 更新到你的最终表 df2_final 中
# 重新执行一遍 left_join，这次 model_df 已经包含了 Top 贡献者
df2_final <- df2 %>%
  left_join(model_df %>% select(time, event, age_at_diagnosis, risk_score, risk_group, 
                                 Top1_Contributor, Top2_Contributor, Top3_Contributor))

# 6. 保存
write_tsv(df2_final, "final_dataset_with_riskscore_and_contributors.tsv")

# 查看结果
head(df2_final %>% select(risk_score, Top1_Contributor, Top2_Contributor, Top3_Contributor))
```

```{r}
write_tsv(df2_final, "final_dataset_with_riskscore.tsv")
```
